description: After a power outage has been restored, a customer calls to ask what caused it.

nodes.task_description: Identify the customer and the recent outage event that affected them.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the record of the outage that occurred yesterday.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the cause code and notes from the closed work order in the outage management system.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the cause was 'Animal Contact' and the crew notes mention a squirrel on a transformer.

nodes.task_description: Communicate the cause of the outage to the customer in clear, non-technical language.

expected_outcome.value: Agent explains that the outage was caused by an animal interfering with the equipment.
